name: Pegasus Resources Inc.
summary: Pegasus Resources Inc., a diversified junior mining company, engages in the exploration of zinc and other base metal properties in North America. The company primarily focuses on the optioned properties in Confederation Lake project totaling 20,700 hectares, which include the Garnet Lake/Arrow Zone property; Fredart and Copperlode property; Dixie property; Joy North property; Joy property; and Mitchell, Gerry Lake, and Karas Lake properties located in Ontario. It also holds the Vanadium claims group project covering 980 acres located in Clark County, Nevada. The company was formerly known as Pistol Bay Mining Inc. and changed its name to Pegasus Resources Inc. December 2020. Pegasus Resources Inc. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
